title: Device Home Screen - Multiple devices - Turning off devices
scenario: Turning off multiple devices one by one shows each as disconnected while others remain connected
steps: Observe that the turned-off device displays as disconnected.
Verify that the remaining devices stay connected.
Turn off the remaining devices one by one.
Observe that each turned-off device displays as disconnected properly.
expected: When a device is turned off, it displays as disconnected while other devices remain connected. Turning off remaining devices one by one shows each as disconnected properly.
